parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_locks (tenant_id, workflow_name, locked_by, expires_at)
VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', 'WF5-CLASSIFY', '{{ $executionId }}', NOW() + INTERVAL '10 minutes')
ON CONFLICT (workflow_name)
DO UPDATE SET locked_at = NOW(), locked_by = '{{ $executionId }}', expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '10 minutes'
WHERE workflow_locks.expires_at < NOW()
RETURNING workflow_name;

SELECT e.id, e.gmail_message_id, e.subject, e.from_email, e.from_name,
       e.body_stripped, e.snippet, e.has_attachments, e.has_ics_attachment,
       e.is_reply, e.gmail_thread_id,
       sp.classification AS sender_class, sp.confidence AS sender_confidence,
       sp.source_name AS sender_source
FROM emails e
LEFT JOIN email_sender_patterns sp ON (
    (sp.pattern_type = 'exact' AND e.from_email = sp.pattern)
    OR (sp.pattern_type = 'domain' AND e.from_email LIKE '%' || REPLACE(REPLACE(sp.pattern, '*@', ''), '*', '%') || '%')
) AND sp.enabled = true
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND e.status = 'ingested'
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN sp.classification = 'job_alert' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC,
    e.date ASC
LIMIT 20;

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-3-5-haiku-20241022",
  "max_tokens": 500,
  "system": "You are an email classification engine for a UK job seeker (L&D / Training professional). Classify the email into exactly one category and return ONLY valid JSON.

Categories:
- acknowledgment: Application received confirmation from employer/ATS
- rejection: Application rejected at any stage
- interview_invite: Interview invitation, scheduling request, or interview-related communication
- recruiter_outreach: Recruitment agency or recruiter reaching out about a role
- job_alert: Job listing digest/alert from a job board
- offer: Job offer or offer-related communication
- follow_up_request: Employer/recruiter requesting documents, references, or action
- marketing: Job board marketing, newsletters, promotions
- not_job_related: Not related to job searching

Return JSON: {"classification": "<category>", "confidence": <0.0-1.0>, "is_urgent": <boolean>, "is_automated": <boolean>, "sender_type": "<employer|recruiter|job_board|ats|personal_contact|unknown>", "rationale": "<brief explanation>"}",
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": "Classify this email:

From: {{ $json.from_email }} ({{ $json.from_name || 'unknown' }})
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Snippet: {{ ($json.snippet || '').substring(0, 300) }}

Body (first 2000 chars):
{{ ($json.body_stripped || $json.snippet || '').substring(0, 2000) }}"
  }]
}

nodes.name: Claude Haiku: Classify
nodes.notes: Uses Anthropic API directly. Ensure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var is set in n8n.

parameters.query:
BEGIN;
INSERT INTO email_classifications (tenant_id, email_id, classification, confidence, rationale,
    is_urgent, is_automated, sender_type,
    classification_method, model_version,
    input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd,
    classified_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.email_id }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $json.classification }}',
    {{ $json.confidence }},
    '{{ ($json.rationale || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}',
    {{ $json.is_urgent }},
    {{ $json.is_automated }},
    '{{ $json.sender_type }}',
    'claude_haiku',
    'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022',
    {{ $json.input_tokens }},
    {{ $json.output_tokens }},
    {{ $json.cost_usd }},
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (email_id) DO NOTHING;

UPDATE emails SET
    status = 'classified',
    classified_at = NOW(),
    is_job_related = {{ $json.classification !== 'not_job_related' && $json.classification !== 'marketing' }}
WHERE id = '{{ $json.email_id }}'::uuid;
COMMIT;

BEGIN;
INSERT INTO email_classifications (tenant_id, email_id, classification, confidence, rationale,
    is_urgent, is_automated, sender_type,
    classification_method, model_version,
    was_escalated, haiku_classification, haiku_confidence,
    manually_reviewed,
    input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd,
    classified_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.email_id }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $json.classification }}',
    {{ $json.confidence }},
    '{{ ($json.rationale || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}',
    {{ $json.is_urgent }},
    {{ $json.is_automated }},
    '{{ $json.sender_type }}',
    'claude_sonnet',
    'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
    true,
    '{{ $json.haiku_classification }}',
    {{ $json.haiku_confidence }},
    false,
    {{ $json.input_tokens }},
    {{ $json.output_tokens }},
    {{ $json.cost_usd }},
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (email_id) DO NOTHING;

UPDATE emails SET
    status = 'classified',
    classified_at = NOW(),
    is_job_related = {{ $json.classification !== 'not_job_related' && $json.classification !== 'marketing' }},
    needs_review = {{ $json.needs_review || false }}
WHERE id = '{{ $json.email_id }}'::uuid;
COMMIT;

INSERT INTO email_processing_log (tenant_id, workflow_name, step, status, details) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', 'WF5-CLASSIFY', 'skipped', 'skipped', '{"reason": "lock not acquired"}'::jsonb);
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true

INSERT INTO workflow_locks (workflow_name, locked_by, expires_at)
VALUES ('WF5-CLASSIFY', '{{ $executionId }}', NOW() + INTERVAL '10 minutes')
ON CONFLICT (workflow_name)
DO UPDATE SET locked_at = NOW(), locked_by = '{{ $executionId }}', expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '10 minutes'
WHERE workflow_locks.expires_at < NOW()
RETURNING workflow_name;

SELECT e.id, e.gmail_message_id, e.subject, e.from_email, e.from_name,
       e.body_stripped, e.snippet, e.has_attachments, e.has_ics_attachment,
       e.is_reply, e.gmail_thread_id,
       sp.classification AS sender_class, sp.confidence AS sender_confidence,
       sp.source_name AS sender_source
FROM emails e
LEFT JOIN email_sender_patterns sp ON (
    (sp.pattern_type = 'exact' AND e.from_email = sp.pattern)
    OR (sp.pattern_type = 'domain' AND e.from_email LIKE '%' || REPLACE(REPLACE(sp.pattern, '*@', ''), '*', '%') || '%')
) AND sp.enabled = true
WHERE e.status = 'ingested'
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN sp.classification = 'job_alert' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC,
    e.date ASC
LIMIT 20;
